cerberus.description: Evaluate an action plan against safety rules
cerberus.name: safety_check

cerberus.description: Pre-execution safety hook for tool calls
cerberus.name: hook_pre_tool

cerberus.description: Post-execution safety hook for tool results
cerberus.name: hook_post_tool

cerberus.description: Scan a model response for confabulation phrases (e.g. claiming background work). Logs warnings but does not block.
cerberus.name: validate_response

parameters.has_async_task: bool — True if an async task was actually submitted (suppresses false positives for legitimate background phrases)
parameters.response_text: str — the full model response text

cerberus.description: Verify Cerberus config has not been tampered with
cerberus.name: config_integrity_check

cerberus.description: Look up biblical ethical guidance for a concept
cerberus.name: ethical_guidance

parameters.concept: str — the ethical concept to look up

cerberus.description: Record a false positive safety check for rule tuning
cerberus.name: false_positive_log

parameters.category: str — category of the false positive
parameters.check_id: str — ID of the check that was a false positive
parameters.notes: str — explanation of why this was a false positive

cerberus.description: Get false positive calibration stats per category
cerberus.name: calibration_stats

parameters.days: int — number of days to look back (default: 30)

cerberus.description: Evaluate an action against biblical ethics using ESV Scripture passages and study notes. Returns ethical category, relevant passages, assessment, and recommendation.
cerberus.name: ethics_lookup

parameters.action: str — the action or tool being evaluated
parameters.plan: str — description of what the action does

cerberus.description: Roll back to a previous snapshot
cerberus.name: rollback_execute

cerberus.description: One-time override for a blocked action. Does not change rules. Only callable by external input sources (user, Telegram).
cerberus.name: creator_exception

parameters.action_category: str — category of the blocked action
parameters.action_details: dict — optional details about the action
parameters.blocked_action_id: str — ID from the blocked safety_check result

cerberus.description: Permanently reclassify a blocked category. Cerberus learns from this. Only callable by external input sources (user, Telegram).
cerberus.name: creator_authorize

parameters.action_category: str — category of the blocked action
parameters.action_details: dict — optional details about the action
parameters.blocked_action_id: str — ID from the blocked safety_check result

cerberus.description: Get report on categories with frequent creator exceptions. Feeds into Harbinger daily safety report.
cerberus.name: false_positive_report

cipher.description: Evaluate mathematical expressions safely (AST-based, no eval). Supports arithmetic, math functions, returns result + steps
cipher.name: calculate

cipher.description: Convert between units: length, weight, volume, temperature, area, digital, time, speed
cipher.name: unit_convert

cipher.description: Date calculations: add/subtract time, difference between dates, day of week, business days
cipher.name: date_math

parameters.operation: str — add, subtract, diff, day_of_week, business_days

cipher.description: Percentage operations: X% of Y, what percent, percent change, markup, margin
cipher.name: percentage

parameters.operation: str — of, what_percent, change, markup, margin

cipher.description: Financial math: compound interest, loan payment (PMT), ROI, break-even, profit/loss. Not financial advice — just math
cipher.name: financial

parameters.operation: str — compound_interest, pmt, roi, break_even, profit_loss

cipher.description: Descriptive statistics on a list of numbers: mean, median, mode, std_dev, min, max, range, sum, count, percentiles
cipher.name: statistics

parameters.operations: list[str] — which stats to compute (default: all)

cipher.description: Boolean logic: truth tables for 2-3 variables, structural analysis of premises/conclusions. Full reasoning in Phase 2+
cipher.name: logic_check

parameters.expression: str — boolean expression for truth table
parameters.variables: list[str] — variable names for truth table

grimoire.description: Save a new memory with metadata and trust level
grimoire.name: memory_store

grimoire.description: Retrieve specific memory by ID or exact match
grimoire.name: memory_recall

grimoire.description: Explicit delete from both ChromaDB and SQLite
grimoire.name: memory_forget

parameters.memory_id: int — ID of memory to delete

grimoire.description: Soft-archive old low-access memories to reduce search noise
grimoire.name: memory_compact

parameters.older_than_days: int — archive memories older than N days (default 30)

grimoire.description: Search memories by content block type (code, error, plan, etc.)
grimoire.name: memory_block_search

parameters.block_type: str — block type to search for

grimoire.description: Store a failure pattern so Shadow learns from mistakes
grimoire.name: store_failure_pattern

parameters.task: str — the original task that failed

grimoire.description: Return most frequently matched failure patterns for growth tracking
grimoire.name: get_common_failures

grimoire.description: Analyze failure pattern trends — is Shadow learning or stagnating?
grimoire.name: get_failure_trend

parameters.days: int — number of days to analyze (default 7)

harbinger.description: Compile morning/evening briefing from module data
harbinger.name: briefing_compile

harbinger.description: Send notification at assigned severity level via Telegram (or log fallback)
harbinger.name: notification_send

harbinger.description: Determine severity level (1-4) for an event
harbinger.name: notification_severity_assign

harbinger.description: Add a deferred decision to the queue
harbinger.name: decision_queue_add

harbinger.description: Get pending decisions for user review
harbinger.name: decision_queue_read

harbinger.description: Mark a decision as resolved after user input
harbinger.name: decision_queue_resolve

harbinger.description: Structure data into report format with sections
harbinger.name: report_compile

harbinger.description: Switch to next delivery channel if primary fails
harbinger.name: channel_fallback

harbinger.description: Scan upcoming tasks for actions needing user approval
harbinger.name: preemptive_approval_scan

harbinger.description: Deliver a compiled briefing through the active channel
harbinger.name: briefing_deliver

harbinger.description: Record user interaction with a briefing section
harbinger.name: personalization_update

morpheus.description: Propose a new experiment for the discovery pipeline
morpheus.name: experiment_propose

parameters.hypothesis: str — what we expect to learn (required)
parameters.input_data: dict — input parameters for the experiment
parameters.parent_experiment_id: str — UUID of parent experiment for follow-ups
parameters.title: str — experiment title (required)

morpheus.description: Move a proposed experiment to running status
morpheus.name: experiment_start

parameters.experiment_id: str — UUID of experiment to start (required)

morpheus.description: Record results for a running experiment
morpheus.name: experiment_complete

parameters.failed: bool — mark as failed instead of completed (default false)

morpheus.description: Score and tier a completed experiment
morpheus.name: experiment_evaluate

morpheus.description: Get overnight experiment queue (proposed, sorted by priority)
morpheus.name: experiment_queue

parameters.max_items: int — max items to return (default from config)

morpheus.description: Compile experiment report for morning briefing
morpheus.name: morpheus_report

morpheus.description: Run an evolution cycle on prompt templates based on performance data
morpheus.name: prompt_evolve

parameters.min_experiments: int — minimum experiments since last evolution (default 10)

morpheus.description: Show template performance stats — which templates produce the best ideas
morpheus.name: prompt_stats

parameters.template_id: str — specific template ID for single-template stats (optional)

morpheus.description: Analyze a Shadow module for improvement opportunities
morpheus.name: self_improve_analyze

parameters.source_path: str — path to source file (default: modules/{module_name}/{module_name}.py)

nova.description: Format structured data into a Markdown document
nova.name: format_document

nova.description: Format findings into a structured Markdown report
nova.name: format_report

nova.description: Format a tone-appropriate email (does not send)
nova.name: format_email

nova.description: Compress content into a scannable briefing section
nova.name: format_briefing_section

nova.description: Apply a named template to provided data
nova.name: template_apply

omen.description: Run code in sandboxed subprocess with timeout
omen.name: code_execute

omen.description: Check code for syntax errors and style violations
omen.name: code_lint

omen.description: Run test suite against code
omen.name: code_test

omen.description: Review code for issues (stub — needs LLM in Phase 2+)
omen.name: code_review

omen.description: Check git repository state
omen.name: git_status

omen.description: Commit changes to repository
omen.name: git_commit

omen.description: Scan for outdated or vulnerable dependencies
omen.name: dependency_check

omen.description: Find files matching a glob pattern
omen.name: code_glob

omen.description: Search for text/regex in code files
omen.name: code_grep

omen.description: Apply a find-and-replace edit to a file
omen.name: code_edit

omen.description: Read a file with line numbers
omen.name: code_read

omen.description: Store a reusable code pattern in the pattern database
omen.name: pattern_store

omen.description: Search stored code patterns by category, tags, or keyword
omen.name: pattern_search

omen.description: Apply a stored pattern with placeholder substitutions
omen.name: pattern_apply

omen.description: Log a code failure for learning and prevention
omen.name: failure_log

omen.description: Search logged failures by type or keyword
omen.name: failure_search

omen.description: Get aggregate statistics on logged failures
omen.name: failure_stats

omen.description: Generate boilerplate code for a new Shadow module
omen.name: scaffold_module

omen.description: Generate test skeleton for a Shadow module
omen.name: scaffold_test

omen.description: Score a Python file on code quality (0-100)
omen.name: code_score

omen.description: Populate pattern database with Shadow codebase patterns
omen.name: seed_patterns

omen.description: Analyze inline code for structure, patterns, quality, and vulnerabilities without generating new code
omen.name: code_analyze

omen.description: Analyze a Python file for structure, patterns, and quality
omen.name: code_analyze_file

omen.description: Analyze all Python files in a directory
omen.name: code_analyze_dir

omen.description: Analyze Shadow's own codebase (modules/) for structure, patterns, quality, and metrics
omen.name: code_analyze_self

omen.description: Download and analyze a single Python file from a URL
omen.name: code_analyze_url

omen.description: Extract learnings from analysis and store in Grimoire
omen.name: code_learn

omen.description: Compare external code patterns against Shadow's codebase
omen.name: code_compare

omen.description: Generate code via LLM with fallback extraction when tool calls fail
omen.name: code_generate

omen.description: List all installed Ollama models with size and quantization
omen.name: model_list

omen.description: Download an Ollama model (consumes disk space)
omen.name: model_pull

omen.description: Run standardized benchmark suite against an Ollama model
omen.name: model_benchmark

omen.description: Score benchmark results on quality (1-5 scale, rule-based)
omen.name: model_evaluate

omen.description: Benchmark and compare multiple Ollama models side by side
omen.name: model_compare

omen.description: Get model details with alignment/censorship warnings
omen.name: model_info

omen.description: Recommend best models for a role based on stored benchmarks
omen.name: model_recommend

omen.description: Execute code in isolated sandbox with safety validation
omen.name: sandbox_execute

omen.description: Validate code safety without executing (static analysis)
omen.name: sandbox_validate

omen.description: Copy sandbox file to production codebase (requires approval)
omen.name: sandbox_to_production

omen.description: Remove old sandbox directories
omen.name: sandbox_cleanup

reaper.description: Retrieve full page content from URL

reaper.description: Download and process YouTube subtitles via yt-dlp
reaper.name: youtube_transcribe

reaper.description: Search a subreddit via Reddit .json endpoint (no auth required)
reaper.name: reddit_search_json

reaper.description: Fetch posts from a subreddit via Reddit .json endpoint
reaper.name: reddit_monitor

sentinel.description: Check current network connections and open ports

sentinel.description: Hash comparison on critical files against baseline

sentinel.description: Check email against known breaches (stub)
sentinel.name: breach_check

sentinel.description: Check host firewall status and active rules
sentinel.name: firewall_status

sentinel.description: Run active threat detection scan on the system

sentinel.description: Monitor network traffic for anomalies in real time

sentinel.description: Analyze system and security logs for suspicious patterns

sentinel.description: Move suspicious file to quarantine directory

sentinel.description: Explain a single firewall rule in plain English with equivalents
sentinel.name: firewall_explain_rule

sentinel.description: Study firewall concepts and store in Grimoire

shadow.description: Create a tracked task assigned to a module
shadow.name: task_create

parameters.assigned_module: str — which module handles this task
parameters.description: str — what needs to be done

shadow.description: Get the current status of a tracked task
shadow.name: task_status

parameters.task_id: str — UUID of the task to check

shadow.description: List tracked tasks, optionally filtered by status
shadow.name: task_list

parameters.status_filter: str | None — pending, in_progress, completed, failed, cancelled

shadow.description: Check if a module is online and get its health metrics
shadow.name: module_health

parameters.module_name: str — name of the module to check

void.description: Collect all system metrics (CPU, RAM, disk, GPU, process memory) and store to DB
void.name: system_snapshot

void.description: Compare current metrics against warning/critical thresholds
void.name: health_check

void.description: Query stored metrics by name and time range
void.name: metric_history

parameters.hours: int — how many hours back to query (default 24)

void.description: Check if Ollama and Shadow process are healthy
void.name: service_check

void.description: Update warning/critical thresholds for a metric
void.name: set_threshold

void.description: Compile full system report with metrics, alerts, and history for Harbinger
void.name: void_report

wraith.description: Answer a question using loaded context and memory
wraith.name: quick_answer

wraith.description: Create a timed reminder. Fires when due_time passes.
wraith.name: reminder_create

parameters.delay_minutes: int | float | None — minutes from now until due
parameters.due_time: str | None — ISO datetime when reminder is due

wraith.description: List all active reminders sorted by importance
wraith.name: reminder_list

wraith.description: Dismiss a reminder (re-surfaces on escalating schedule)
wraith.name: reminder_dismiss

wraith.description: Classify and suggest routing for a user task
wraith.name: classify_task

wraith.description: Check for proactive suggestions based on patterns
wraith.name: proactive_check

wraith.description: Prompt user for clarification with optional choices
wraith.name: ask_user

parameters.question: str — the question to ask the user

wraith.description: Record an event for temporal pattern tracking
wraith.name: temporal_record

wraith.description: Get detected temporal patterns from event history
wraith.name: temporal_patterns

wraith.description: Check for neglected tasks and decisions
wraith.name: neglect_check

wraith.description: Get proactive suggestions based on patterns and neglect detection
wraith.name: proactive_suggestions
